commands.review_summary:
The PR classifies `registerTranscriptSourceProvider` registration probes as metadata-only synthetic probes and adds a focused synthetic-probe regression test.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established here. Source review confirms current main lacks a transcript-source-provider classifier and the PR adds a deterministic unit-level reproduction, but the beta dashboard hydration failure itself was not reproduced locally.
